message:
test(fusion): add boundary and edge-case tests across all 7 fusion modules

blend: Add tests for both-empty, fast-only, quality-only, symmetric 0.5
blend factor, NaN blend factor fallback, identical-list rank changes, and
empty-list rank changes.

cache: Add tests for sentinel hash-missing comparison, count-vs-hash
priority, fresh staleness report, staleness serde round-trip, and zero
source count sentinel round-trip.

conformal: Add tests for AdaptiveConformalState zero/NaN/negative gamma
rejection, NaN and out-of-range error rate rejection, p-value for ranks
beyond calibration set, single-element calibration, Mondrian empty and
zero-rank rejection, and adaptive alpha decrease on low error rate.

normalize: Add tests for all-negative min-max and z-score, single-element
normalization, empty-input no-op, and all-NaN mapping to zero.

ope: Add tests for single-observation IPS, all-zero and all-one rewards,
all-zero-weight ESS, DR with zero predictions degenerating to IPS, and
non-negative finite confidence intervals.

queue: Add tests for zero-capacity queue immediate-full, metadata
preservation through pipeline, retry boundary (max_retries transitions),
double drain_empty stability, pending_count/is_empty consistency, and
metrics tracking for retries and failures.

rrf: Add tests for zero-multiplier candidate count, zero limit/offset,
offset beyond results, and single-element single-source correct rank
attribution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
